---
title: "Python-DB Playground"
page-layout: full
---

````{=html}
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/ace/1.32.7/ace.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/pyodide/v0.25.1/full/pyodide.js"></script>

<style>
:root {
  --pg-radius-lg: 12px;
  --pg-radius-md: 8px;
  --pg-radius-sm: 6px;
  --pg-shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05);
  --pg-border-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  --pg-bg-surface: #ffffff;
  --pg-bg-subtle: #f9fafb;
  --pg-text-main: #111827;
  --pg-text-muted: #6b7280;
  --pg-primary: #2563eb;
  --pg-primary-hover: #1d4ed8;
}

body.quarto-dark {
  --pg-border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
  --pg-bg-surface: #1f2937;
  --pg-bg-subtle: #111827;
  --pg-text-main: #f9fafb;
  --pg-text-muted: #9ca3af;
  --pg-primary: #3b82f6;
  --pg-primary-hover: #60a5fa;
}

.playground-container {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1.2rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
  color: var(--pg-text-main);
  min-height: calc(100vh - 120px);
}

.playground-header {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  overflow-x: auto;
  background: var(--pg-bg-surface);
  padding: 0.4rem 0.6rem;
  border-radius: var(--pg-radius-lg);
  box-shadow: var(--pg-shadow-sm);
  border: 1px solid var(--pg-border-color);
}

.playground-body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  position: relative;
  min-height: 0;
}

.playground-main {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: calc(300px + 1.2rem);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  transition: right 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
}
.playground-main.collapsed-sidebar {
  right: calc(50px + 1.2rem);
}

.resizer-y {
  height: 16px;
  background-color: transparent;
  cursor: row-resize;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: background-color 0.2s;
  z-index: 20;
}
.resizer-y::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 40px;
  height: 4px;
  background-color: var(--pg-border-color);
  border-radius: 4px;
  transition: background-color 0.2s;
}
.resizer-y:hover::after, .resizer-y.dragging::after {
  background-color: var(--pg-primary);
}

/* Schema Sidebar */
.schema-sidebar {
  width: 300px;
  border: 1px solid var(--pg-border-color);
  border-radius: var(--pg-radius-lg);
  background-color: var(--pg-bg-surface);
  box-shadow: var(--pg-shadow-sm);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  transition: width 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
  resize: vertical;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 120px);
}
.schema-sidebar.collapsed {
  width: 50px;
}
.schema-sidebar.collapsed .schema-content,
.schema-sidebar.collapsed .schema-select,
.schema-sidebar.collapsed #schema-link {
  display: none !important;
}
.schema-sidebar.collapsed .schema-header {
  justify-content: center;
}
.schema-header {
  padding: 0.6rem 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--pg-border-color);
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  background-color: var(--pg-bg-subtle);
  gap: 0.4rem;
}
.schema-select {
  padding: 0.25rem 0.4rem;
  border-radius: var(--pg-radius-sm);
  border: 1px solid var(--pg-border-color);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  background-color: var(--pg-bg-surface);
  color: var(--pg-text-main);
  cursor: pointer;
  outline: none;
  transition: border-color 0.2s;
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}
.schema-select:focus {
  border-color: var(--pg-primary);
}

/* Editor controls wrapper */
.editor-controls {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
}
.theme-select {
  padding: 0.15rem 0.3rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--pg-border-color);
  border-radius: var(--pg-radius-md);
  background: var(--pg-bg-subtle);
  color: var(--pg-text-main);
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-family: inherit;
  cursor: pointer;
  outline: none;
}

/* Font size controls */
.font-size-controls {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.2rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--pg-border-color);
  border-radius: var(--pg-radius-md);
  padding: 0.15rem;
  background: var(--pg-bg-subtle);
}
.font-size-controls button {
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: var(--pg-text-main);
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}
.font-size-controls button:hover {
  background: var(--pg-border-color);
}
.font-size-label {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: var(--pg-text-muted);
  min-width: 28px;
  text-align: center;
  user-select: none;
}
.schema-content {
  padding: 0.6rem;
  overflow-y: auto;
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
}
.schema-table-item {
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 0.35rem 0.5rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  border-radius: var(--pg-radius-sm);
  transition: background-color 0.15s;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
}
.schema-table-item:hover {
  background-color: var(--pg-bg-subtle);
  color: var(--pg-primary);
}
.schema-columns {
  list-style: none;
  padding-left: 1.2rem;
  margin: 0 0 0.2rem 0;
  display: none;
}
.schema-columns.expanded {
  display: block;
  animation: fadeIn 0.15s ease;
}
@keyframes fadeIn {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-4px); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
.schema-column {
  font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--pg-text-main);
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 0.15rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--pg-border-color);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}
.schema-column:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.schema-type {
  font-size: 0.75em;
  color: var(--pg-text-muted);
  font-family: monospace;
  background: var(--pg-bg-subtle);
  padding: 1px 4px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

/* Key Badges */
.key-badge {
  font-size: 0.7em;
  padding: 1px 4px;
  border-radius: 3px;
  margin-left: 4px;
  font-weight: 600;
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.key-pk { background-color: #fef08a; color: #854d0e; }
.key-fk { background-color: #bfdbfe; color: #1e3a8a; }
body.quarto-dark .key-pk { background-color: rgba(254, 240, 138, 0.2); color: #fde047; }
body.quarto-dark .key-fk { background-color: rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.2); color: #93c5fd; }
.key-fk-link {
  font-size: 0.85em;
  color: var(--pg-text-muted);
  margin-left: 4px;
  font-family: monospace;
}

/* Editor */
.editor-section {
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 100px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  border: 1px solid var(--pg-border-color);
  border-radius: var(--pg-radius-lg);
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: var(--pg-shadow-sm);
}

#python-editor {
  flex: 1;
  width: 100%;
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', Consolas, monospace;
}

/* Results */
.result-section {
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  background-color: var(--pg-bg-surface);
  border: 1px solid var(--pg-border-color);
  border-radius: var(--pg-radius-lg);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: var(--pg-shadow-sm);
}
.result-section-inner {
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 0.75rem;
}
.result-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}
.result-table th, .result-table td {
  padding: 0.55rem 0.75rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--pg-border-color);
}
.result-table th {
  background-color: #f1f5f9;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-align: left;
  color: #1e293b;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  z-index: 10;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 0 var(--pg-border-color);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--pg-border-color);
}
body.quarto-dark .result-table th {
  background-color: #1e293b;
  color: #e2e8f0;
}
.th-datatype {
  color: #059669;
  font-weight: normal;
  text-transform: lowercase;
  font-size: 0.75em;
}
body.quarto-dark .th-datatype {
  color: #34d399;
}

.result-table tr:hover {
  background-color: var(--pg-bg-subtle);
}
.result-table td {
  color: var(--pg-text-main);
}
.null-cell {
  color: var(--pg-text-muted) !important;
  font-style: italic;
  opacity: 0.7;
}

/* Console output area */
.console-output-area {
  color: var(--pg-text-main);
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  padding: 0.75rem;
  border-radius: var(--pg-radius-md);
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  word-break: break-all;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  max-height: 300px;
  overflow: auto;
}
body.quarto-dark .console-output-area {
  color: var(--pg-text-main);
}

/* Buttons */
.pg-btn {
  padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem;
  border-radius: var(--pg-radius-md);
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 500;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  transition: all 0.15s;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  line-height: 1;
  white-space: nowrap;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.pg-btn-primary {
  background-color: var(--pg-primary);
  color: white;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgb(37 99 235 / 0.2);
}
.pg-btn-primary:hover {
  background-color: var(--pg-primary-hover);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.pg-btn-secondary {
  background-color: var(--pg-bg-subtle);
  color: var(--pg-text-main);
  border: 1px solid var(--pg-border-color);
}
.pg-btn-secondary:hover {
  background-color: var(--pg-border-color);
}
.pg-btn-icon {
  padding: 0.35rem;
  border-radius: var(--pg-radius-md);
  background: transparent;
  border: 1px solid var(--pg-border-color);
  color: var(--pg-text-muted);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.15s;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
}
.pg-btn-icon:hover {
  background: var(--pg-bg-subtle);
  color: var(--pg-text-main);
}

/* Error */
.error-msg {
  color: #dc2626;
  background-color: #fef2f2;
  padding: 0.75rem;
  border-radius: var(--pg-radius-md);
  border: 1px solid #fca5a5;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  font-family: monospace;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}
body.quarto-dark .error-msg {
  background-color: rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.1);
  border-color: rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.3);
  color: #fca5a5;
}

#loading-indicator {
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--pg-primary);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.spinner {
  width: 1rem;
  height: 1rem;
  border: 2px solid var(--pg-primary);
  border-top-color: transparent;
  border-radius: 50%;
  animation: spin 0.7s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes spin {
  to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

.shortcut-hint {
  margin-left: auto;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--pg-text-muted);
}
.shortcut-hint kbd {
  background: var(--pg-bg-subtle);
  border: 1px solid var(--pg-border-color);
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 1px 5px;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-family: inherit;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .playground-body {
    flex-direction: column;
  }
  .playground-main {
    position: relative;
    right: auto !important;
    height: 60vh;
  }
  .schema-sidebar {
    width: 100% !important;
    min-height: 300px;
  }
  .schema-sidebar.collapsed {
    height: 50px;
    min-height: 50px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .shortcut-hint { display: none; }
}
</style>

<div class="playground-container">
  <div class="playground-header">

    <button id="run-btn" class="pg-btn pg-btn-primary">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"><polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"></polygon></svg>
      Run Python
    </button>
    <button id="reset-btn" class="pg-btn pg-btn-secondary">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 12a9 9 0 1 0 9-9 9.75 9.75 0 0 0-6.74 2.74L3 8"></path><polyline points="3 3 3 8 8 8"></polyline></svg>
      Reset
    </button>
    <div class="editor-controls">
      <select id="theme-select" class="theme-select" title="Editor Theme">
        <optgroup label="Light Themes">
          <option value="ace/theme/chrome">Chrome</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/clouds">Clouds</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/crimson_editor">Crimson Editor</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/dawn">Dawn</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/dreamweaver">Dreamweaver</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/eclipse">Eclipse</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/github">GitHub</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/iplastic">IPlastic</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/solarized_light">Solarized Light</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/textmate">TextMate</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/tomorrow">Tomorrow</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/xcode">XCode</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/kuroir">Kuroir</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/katzenmilch">KatzenMilch</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/sqlserver">SQL Server</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/cloud_editor">CloudEditor</option>
        </optgroup>
        <optgroup label="Dark Themes">
          <option value="ace/theme/ambiance">Ambiance</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/chaos">Chaos</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/cloud_editor_dark">CloudEditor Dark</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/clouds_midnight">Clouds Midnight</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/cobalt">Cobalt</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/dracula">Dracula</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/github_dark">GitHub Dark</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/gob">Green on Black</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/gruvbox">Gruvbox</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/idle_fingers">idle Fingers</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/kr_theme">krTheme</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/merbivore">Merbivore</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/merbivore_soft">Merbivore Soft</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/mono_industrial">Mono Industrial</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/monokai">Monokai</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/nord_dark">Nord Dark</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/one_dark">One Dark</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/pastel_on_dark">Pastel on dark</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/solarized_dark">Solarized Dark</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/terminal">Terminal</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/tomorrow_night">Tomorrow Night</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/tomorrow_night_blue">Tomorrow Night Blue</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/tomorrow_night_bright">Tomorrow Night Bright</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/tomorrow_night_eighties">Tomorrow Night 80s</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/twilight">Twilight</option>
          <option value="ace/theme/vibrant_ink">Vibrant Ink</option>
        </optgroup>
      </select>
      <div class="font-size-controls">
        <button id="font-dec" title="Decrease font size">A-</button>
        <span id="font-size-label" class="font-size-label">16px</span>
        <button id="font-inc" title="Increase font size">A+</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <span class="shortcut-hint"><kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>/</kbd> comment &nbsp; <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>Enter</kbd> run</span>
  </div>

  <div class="playground-body">
    <div class="playground-main" id="playground-main">
      <div class="editor-section" id="editor-section">
        <div id="python-editor"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="resizer-y" id="resizer-y" title="Drag to resize"></div>
      <div class="result-section" id="result-section">
        <div class="result-section-inner">
          <div id="loading-indicator" style="display: none;"><div class="spinner"></div> Running...</div>
          <div id="error-message" class="error-msg" style="display: none;"></div>
          <div id="result-table-container"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="schema-sidebar" id="schema-sidebar">
      <div class="schema-header">
        <select id="schema-select" class="schema-select">
          <option value="flis" selected>FLIS (flis)</option>
          <option value="lis">LIS (lis)</option>
          <option value="eshop">eShop (eshop)</option>
          <option value="university">University (university)</option>
          <option value="test_db">My Workspace (test_db)</option>
        </select>
        <a id="schema-link" href="schema/flis.png" target="_blank" class="pg-btn pg-btn-secondary" title="View Schema" style="text-decoration: none; padding: 4px 6px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; margin-right: auto; margin-left: 5px; flex-shrink: 0;">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2"></rect><circle cx="8.5" cy="8.5" r="1.5"></circle><polyline points="21 15 16 10 5 21"></polyline></svg>
        </a>
        <button id="toggle-schema-btn" class="pg-btn-icon" title="Toggle Sidebar">
          <svg id="icon-collapse" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"></polyline></svg>
          <svg id="icon-expand" style="display:none;" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="15 18 9 12 15 6"></polyline></svg>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="schema-content" id="schema-content"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script id="playground-data" type="application/json">
{
  "iconFolder": "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='14' height='14' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M22 19a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h5l2 3h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z'></path></svg>",
  "iconFolderOpen": "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='14' height='14' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M5 19a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V7a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4l2 2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1M5 19h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2H9a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v5a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z'></path></svg>",
  "defaultCode": "",
  "mockPsycopg2": "import sys\nimport os\n\nos.environ['PGUSER'] = 'postgres'\nos.environ['PGPASSWORD'] = 'password'\nos.environ['PGHOST'] = '127.0.0.1'\nos.environ['PGPORT'] = '5432'\n\nclass psycopg2:\n    DatabaseError = Exception\n    Error = Exception\n    _last_db = 'flis'\n    _VALID_DBS = {'flis', 'lis', 'eshop', 'university', 'test_db'}\n    _REQUIRED_KEYS = {'database', 'user', 'password', 'host', 'port'}\n\n    class MockCursor:\n        def __init__(self):\n            self.results = []\n            self.rowcount = -1\n        \n        async def execute(self, query):\n            import js\n            from pyodide.ffi import to_js\n            from js import Object\n            opts = Object.new()\n            opts.rowMode = 'array'\n            res = await js.db.query(query, to_js([]), opts)\n            if hasattr(res, 'rows'):\n                self.results = [tuple(row) for row in res.rows]\n                self.rowcount = len(self.results)\n            else:\n                self.results = []\n                self.rowcount = 0\n            return self\n\n        async def fetchall(self):\n            res = self.results\n            self.results = []\n            return res\n        \n        async def fetchone(self):\n            if self.results:\n                return self.results.pop(0)\n            return None\n\n        async def fetchmany(self, size=None):\n            if size is None:\n                size = 1\n            res = self.results[:size]\n            self.results = self.results[size:]\n            return res\n\n        async def close(self):\n            pass\n\n    class MockConnection:\n        def __init__(self, dbname):\n            self._dbname = dbname\n\n        async def cursor(self):\n            return psycopg2.MockCursor()\n        \n        async def commit(self):\n            pass\n\n        async def rollback(self):\n            pass\n\n        async def close(self):\n            pass\n\n    @staticmethod\n    async def connect(**kwargs):\n        import js\n        _bad_keys = set(kwargs.keys()) - psycopg2._REQUIRED_KEYS\n        if _bad_keys:\n            raise psycopg2.DatabaseError('Unrecognized parameter(s): ' + ', '.join(sorted(_bad_keys)))\n        dbname = kwargs.get('database', None)\n        if dbname is None:\n            raise psycopg2.DatabaseError('Missing required parameter: database.\\nAvailable databases: ' + ', '.join(sorted(psycopg2._VALID_DBS)))\n        if dbname not in psycopg2._VALID_DBS:\n            raise psycopg2.DatabaseError('Unknown database: \"' + str(dbname) + '\"\\nAvailable databases: ' + ', '.join(sorted(psycopg2._VALID_DBS)))\n        psycopg2._last_db = dbname\n        await js.getDB(dbname)\n        if dbname != 'test_db':\n            await js.db.exec('SET SESSION ROLE readonly_user;')\n        else:\n            await js.db.exec('RESET ROLE;')\n        return psycopg2.MockConnection(dbname)\n\nsys.modules['psycopg2'] = psycopg2\n\ndel psycopg2\ndel sys\ndel os\n"
}
</script>

<script type="module">
import { PGlite } from "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@electric-sql/pglite/dist/index.js";

let databases = {};
let pyodide = null;
let currentDataset = "";
let pyodideReady = false;

var playgroundData = JSON.parse(document.getElementById("playground-data").textContent);
var iconFolder = playgroundData.iconFolder;
var iconFolderOpen = playgroundData.iconFolderOpen;

var editor = ace.edit("python-editor");
editor.setTheme("ace/theme/textmate");
editor.session.setMode("ace/mode/python");
editor.setOptions({ 
  showPrintMargin: false, 
  wrap: true,
  enableBasicAutocompletion: true,
  enableLiveAutocompletion: true,
  useSoftTabs: true,
  tabSize: 4,
  fontSize: "16px"
});
document.getElementById('python-editor').addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Tab') {
    e.stopPropagation();
  }
}, true);

var savedPythonCode = localStorage.getItem("pythonPlaygroundCode");
if (savedPythonCode !== null) {
  editor.setValue(savedPythonCode, -1);
} else {
  editor.setValue(playgroundData.defaultCode || "", -1);
}
editor.getSession().on('change', function() {
  localStorage.setItem("pythonPlaygroundCode", editor.getValue());
});

function syncTheme() {
  var isDark = document.body.classList.contains("quarto-dark");
  var themeSelect = document.getElementById("theme-select");
  
  var lightTheme = localStorage.getItem("playgroundLightTheme") || "ace/theme/textmate";
  var darkTheme = localStorage.getItem("playgroundDarkTheme") || "ace/theme/tomorrow_night";
  
  var currentTheme = isDark ? darkTheme : lightTheme;
  
  if (themeSelect) themeSelect.value = currentTheme;
  editor.setTheme(currentTheme);
}
syncTheme();
new MutationObserver(syncTheme).observe(document.body, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ["class"] });

document.getElementById("theme-select").addEventListener("change", function(e) {
  var isDark = document.body.classList.contains("quarto-dark");
  if (isDark) {
    localStorage.setItem("playgroundDarkTheme", e.target.value);
  } else {
    localStorage.setItem("playgroundLightTheme", e.target.value);
  }
  syncTheme();
});

function fmtDate(d) {
  if (!(d instanceof Date) || isNaN(d)) return d;
  var iso = d.toISOString();
  return iso.endsWith("T00:00:00.000Z") ? iso.split("T")[0] : iso.replace("T", " ").substring(0, 19);
}

function sanitizeSQL(sql) {
  var lines = sql.split("\n");
  var cleaned = [];
  var copyMode = null;

  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    var line = lines[i];

    if (copyMode) {
      if (line.trim() === "\\.") {
        copyMode = null;
        continue;
      }
      var values = line.split("\t").map(function(v) {
        if (v === "\\N") return "NULL";
        return "'" + v.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'";
      });
      cleaned.push("INSERT INTO " + copyMode.table + " " + copyMode.cols + " VALUES (" + values.join(", ") + ");");
      continue;
    }

    var trimmed = line.trim();
    if (trimmed.match(/^\\[a-zA-Z]/)) continue;
    if (trimmed.match(/^SET\s/i)) continue;
    if (trimmed.match(/^SELECT\s+pg_catalog/i)) continue;
    if (trimmed.match(/OWNER TO/i)) continue;
    if (trimmed.match(/^(REVOKE|GRANT)\s/i) && trimmed.match(/(ON SCHEMA|ON DATABASE|FROM |TO )/i)) continue;
    if (trimmed.match(/^CREATE EXTENSION/i)) continue;
    if (trimmed.match(/^-- (Dumped from|Dumped by|Name:.*Owner:)/)) continue;

    var copyMatch = line.match(/^COPY\s+(?:public\.)?([\w]+)\s*(\([^)]+\))\s+FROM\s+stdin;/i);
    if (copyMatch) {
      copyMode = { table: copyMatch[1], cols: copyMatch[2] };
      continue;
    }

    line = line.replace(/public\./g, "");
    cleaned.push(line);
  }
  return cleaned.join("\n");
}

// Font size management
var currentFontSize = parseInt(localStorage.getItem("playgroundFontSize")) || 16;
function updateFontSize(newSize) {
  if (newSize < 10) newSize = 10;
  if (newSize > 28) newSize = 28;
  currentFontSize = newSize;
  localStorage.setItem("playgroundFontSize", newSize);
  editor.setFontSize(newSize + "px");
  var label = document.getElementById("font-size-label");
  if (label) label.textContent = newSize + "px";
}
updateFontSize(currentFontSize);

let globalSchema = {};

async function refreshSchema(dsId) {
  if (!dsId) dsId = currentDataset || "flis";
  var targetDb;
  try {
    targetDb = await getDB(dsId);
  } catch(e) { return; }
  globalSchema = {};
  var el = document.getElementById("schema-content");
  el.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--pg-text-muted);margin-top:1rem"><div class="spinner" style="display:inline-block;margin-right:5px;border-color:var(--pg-text-muted);border-top-color:transparent"></div>Loading...</div>';
  
  var errEl = document.getElementById("error-message");
  var rc = document.getElementById("result-table-container");
  if (errEl) errEl.style.display = "none";
  if (rc) rc.innerHTML = '<p style="text-align:center;margin-top:2rem;color:var(--pg-text-muted)">Python Environment initialized. Write a script and click Run Script.</p>';
  try {
    if (dsId !== "test_db") await targetDb.exec("RESET ROLE;");
    
    var arr = await targetDb.exec("SELECT table_name, column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;");
    var res = arr[arr.length - 1];
    if (!res || res.rows.length === 0) { el.innerHTML = '<p style="padding:0.5rem;color:var(--pg-text-muted)">No tables found.</p>'; return; }
    
    var constArr = await targetDb.exec("SELECT DISTINCT tc.table_name, kcu.column_name, tc.constraint_type, ccu.table_name AS foreign_table_name FROM information_schema.table_constraints AS tc JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage AS kcu ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name AND tc.constraint_schema = kcu.constraint_schema LEFT JOIN information_schema.constraint_column_usage AS ccu ON ccu.constraint_name = tc.constraint_name AND ccu.constraint_schema = tc.constraint_schema WHERE tc.constraint_type IN ('PRIMARY KEY', 'FOREIGN KEY') AND tc.table_schema = 'public';");
    var constraints = {};
    if (constArr.length > 0 && constArr[constArr.length - 1].rows) {
      constArr[constArr.length - 1].rows.forEach(function(r) {
        var t = r.table_name;
        var c = r.column_name;
        if (!constraints[t]) constraints[t] = {};
        if (!constraints[t][c]) constraints[t][c] = [];
        if (r.constraint_type === 'PRIMARY KEY') {
          if (!constraints[t][c].some(function(k) { return k.type === 'PK'; })) constraints[t][c].push({ type: 'PK' });
        } else if (r.constraint_type === 'FOREIGN KEY') {
          if (!constraints[t][c].some(function(k) { return k.type === 'FK' && k.toTable === r.foreign_table_name; })) constraints[t][c].push({ type: 'FK', toTable: r.foreign_table_name });
        }
      });
    }

    var tables = {};
    res.rows.forEach(function(r) { if (!tables[r.table_name]) tables[r.table_name] = []; tables[r.table_name].push({ name: r.column_name, type: r.data_type }); });
    el.innerHTML = "";
    Object.keys(tables).forEach(function(tbl) {
      var div = document.createElement("div");
      var hdr = document.createElement("div");
      hdr.className = "schema-table-item";
      hdr.innerHTML = '<span class="tbl-icon">' + iconFolder + '</span> <span>' + tbl + '</span>';
      var ul = document.createElement("ul");
      ul.className = "schema-columns";
      tables[tbl].forEach(function(c) {
        var li = document.createElement("li");
        li.className = "schema-column";
        var dt = c.type;
        if (dt === "character varying") dt = "varchar";
        if (dt === "integer") dt = "int";
        
        var keyHtml = "";
        var keyTitle = "";
        var isPk = false;
        var isFk = false;
        if (constraints[tbl] && constraints[tbl][c.name]) {
          constraints[tbl][c.name].forEach(function(k) {
            if (k.type === 'PK') { keyHtml += '<span class="key-badge key-pk" title="Primary Key">PK</span>'; isPk = true; }
            if (k.type === 'FK') { keyTitle = "FK to " + k.toTable; keyHtml += '<span class="key-badge key-fk" title="' + keyTitle + '">FK</span><span class="key-fk-link" title="'+keyTitle+'">&rarr; '+k.toTable+'</span>'; isFk = true; }
          });
        }
        
        if (!globalSchema[tbl]) globalSchema[tbl] = {};
        globalSchema[tbl][c.name] = { type: dt, pk: isPk, fk: isFk, fkTitle: keyTitle };

        li.innerHTML = '<span title="' + keyTitle + '">' + c.name + keyHtml + '</span> <span class="schema-type">' + dt + '</span>';
        ul.appendChild(li);
      });
      hdr.addEventListener("click", function() {
        var exp = ul.classList.toggle("expanded");
        hdr.querySelector(".tbl-icon").innerHTML = exp ? iconFolderOpen : iconFolder;
      });
      div.appendChild(hdr);
      div.appendChild(ul);
      el.appendChild(div);
    });
  } catch(e) {
    el.innerHTML = '<p style="padding:0.5rem;color:#dc2626">Failed to load schema.</p>';
    console.error(e);
  }
}

window.getDB = getDB;
async function getDB(dsId) {
  if (databases[dsId]) {
    window.db = databases[dsId];
    return databases[dsId];
  }
  if (dsId === "test_db") {
    databases[dsId] = new PGlite("idb://playground-test-db");
  } else {
    databases[dsId] = new PGlite();
    try {
      var r = await fetch("datasets/" + dsId + ".sql");
      if (r.ok) { var sql = await r.text(); if (sql.trim().length > 0) { sql = sanitizeSQL(sql); await databases[dsId].exec(sql); } }
      else throw new Error("Failed to load dataset: " + r.statusText);
    } catch(fe) { console.warn("Could not fetch dataset", fe); }
    await databases[dsId].exec("DO $$ BEGIN IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT FROM pg_catalog.pg_roles WHERE rolname = 'readonly_user') THEN CREATE ROLE readonly_user; END IF; END $$;");
    await databases[dsId].exec("GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA public TO readonly_user;");
    await databases[dsId].exec("GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO readonly_user;");
    await databases[dsId].exec("ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA public GRANT SELECT ON TABLES TO readonly_user;");
  }
  window.db = databases[dsId];
  return databases[dsId];
}

async function initDB(dsId) {
  currentDataset = dsId;
  await refreshSchema(dsId);
}

async function initPyodide() {
  var loading = document.getElementById("loading-indicator");
  loading.style.display = "flex";
  loading.innerHTML = '<div class="spinner"></div> Initializing (first load may take a moment)...';
  try {
    pyodide = await loadPyodide();
    // Inject the mock psycopg2 module
    await pyodide.runPythonAsync(playgroundData.mockPsycopg2);
    pyodideReady = true;
    loading.style.display = "none";
  } catch(err) {
    loading.style.display = "none";
    var errEl = document.getElementById("error-message");
    errEl.style.display = "block";
    errEl.textContent = "Error initializing Pyodide:\n" + err.message;
  }
}

async function runPython() {
  var code = editor.getValue();
  
  var loading = document.getElementById("loading-indicator");
  var errEl = document.getElementById("error-message");
  var rc = document.getElementById("result-table-container");
  if (!code.trim()) return;
  loading.style.display = "flex";
  loading.innerHTML = '<div class="spinner"></div> Running...';
  errEl.style.display = "none";
  rc.innerHTML = "";

  // Initialize Pyodide on first run if not ready yet
  if (!pyodideReady) {
    loading.innerHTML = '<div class="spinner"></div> Initializing (first load may take a moment)...';
    await initPyodide();
    if (!pyodideReady) return;
    loading.innerHTML = '<div class="spinner"></div> Running...';
  }
  try {
    // Transform synchronous psycopg2 calls to async awaits
    var transformedCode = code
      .replace(/\bpsycopg2\.connect\s*\(/g, "await psycopg2.connect(")
      .replace(/\b(\w+)\.cursor\s*\(\s*\)/g, "await $1.cursor()")
      .replace(/\b(\w+)\.execute\s*\(/g, "await $1.execute(")
      .replace(/\b(\w+)\.fetchall\s*\(\s*\)/g, "await $1.fetchall()")
      .replace(/\b(\w+)\.fetchone\s*\(\s*\)/g, "await $1.fetchone()")
      .replace(/\b(\w+)\.fetchmany\s*\((.*?)\)/g, "await $1.fetchmany($2)")
      .replace(/\b(\w+)\.commit\s*\(\s*\)/g, "await $1.commit()")
      .replace(/\b(\w+)\.rollback\s*\(\s*\)/g, "await $1.rollback()")
      .replace(/\b(\w+)\.close\s*\(\s*\)/g, "await $1.close()");
    
    // Avoid double-awaiting
    transformedCode = transformedCode.replace(/await\s+await\s+/g, "await ");

    // Clear globals and capture stdout
    var captureSetup = "for k in list(globals().keys()): globals().pop(k) if k not in ['__builtins__', '__name__', '__doc__', '__package__', '__loader__', '__spec__'] else None\nimport io as _io, sys as _sys\n_capture_buf = _io.StringIO()\n_old_stdout = _sys.stdout\n_sys.stdout = _capture_buf\n";
    var captureEnd = "\n_sys.stdout = _old_stdout\n_captured_output = _capture_buf.getvalue()\n_capture_buf.close()\n_captured_output";

    var result = await pyodide.runPythonAsync(captureSetup + transformedCode + captureEnd);
    
    loading.style.display = "none";

    // Display output
    var output = result ? result.toString() : "";
    if (output.trim().length > 0) {
      var pre = document.createElement("div");
      pre.className = "console-output-area";
      pre.textContent = output;
      rc.appendChild(pre);
    } else {
      rc.innerHTML = '<p style="padding:1rem;color:var(--pg-primary)">Code executed successfully (no output).</p>';
    }
  } catch(err) {
    loading.style.display = "none";
    errEl.style.display = "block";
    
    // Fix Pyodide traceback line numbers and filename
    var msg = err.message;
    msg = msg.replace(/File "<exec>", line (\d+)/g, function(match, p1) {
      var realLine = parseInt(p1) - 5; // Subtract lines from captureSetup
      return 'File "<stdin>", line ' + Math.max(1, realLine);
    });
    
    errEl.textContent = msg;
  }
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  var runBtn = document.getElementById("run-btn");
  var toggleBtn = document.getElementById("toggle-schema-btn");
  var sidebar = document.getElementById("schema-sidebar");
  var icC = document.getElementById("icon-collapse");
  var icE = document.getElementById("icon-expand");
  var schemaSelect = document.getElementById("schema-select");
  schemaSelect.addEventListener("change", function(e) { 
    refreshSchema(e.target.value); 
    var val = e.target.value;
    var sLink = document.getElementById("schema-link");
    if (sLink) {
      sLink.style.display = (val === 'test_db') ? 'none' : 'inline-flex';
      sLink.href = 'schema/' + val + '.png';
    }
  });
  runBtn.addEventListener("click", runPython);
  var resetBtn = document.getElementById("reset-btn");
  if (resetBtn) {
    resetBtn.addEventListener("click", function() {
      var rc = document.getElementById("result-table-container");
      if (rc) rc.innerHTML = '<p style="text-align:center;margin-top:2rem;color:var(--pg-text-muted)">Environment re-initialized. Write a script and click Run.</p>';
      var errEl = document.getElementById("error-message");
      if (errEl) errEl.style.display = "none";
      if (pyodideReady && pyodide) {
        pyodide.runPython("for _name in list(globals().keys()):\\n    if not _name.startswith('_'):\\n        del globals()[_name]");
      }
      var dsId = schemaSelect.value;
      if (databases[dsId] && dsId !== "test_db") {
        databases[dsId].close().then(function() {
          delete databases[dsId];
          refreshSchema(dsId);
        });
      } else {
        refreshSchema(dsId);
      }
    });
  }
  toggleBtn.addEventListener("click", function() {
    var c = sidebar.classList.toggle("collapsed");
    mainSec.classList.toggle("collapsed-sidebar", c);
    icC.style.display = c ? "none" : "block";
    icE.style.display = c ? "block" : "none";
  });
  document.getElementById("font-inc").addEventListener("click", function() { updateFontSize(currentFontSize + 1); });
  document.getElementById("font-dec").addEventListener("click", function() { updateFontSize(currentFontSize - 1); });
  editor.commands.addCommand({ name: "runPython", bindKey: { win: "Ctrl-Enter", mac: "Command-Enter" }, exec: function() { runPython(); }, readOnly: true });

  // Resizer Logic
  var resizer = document.getElementById('resizer-y');
  var editorSec = document.getElementById('editor-section');
  var mainSec = document.getElementById('playground-main');
  var isDragging = false;
  resizer.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
    isDragging = true;
    resizer.classList.add('dragging');
    document.body.style.cursor = 'row-resize';
    e.preventDefault();
  });
  document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
    if (!isDragging) return;
    var containerRect = mainSec.getBoundingClientRect();
    var newHeight = e.clientY - containerRect.top;
    if (newHeight < 100) newHeight = 100;
    if (newHeight > containerRect.height - 100) newHeight = containerRect.height - 100;
    editorSec.style.flex = '0 0 ' + newHeight + 'px';
    editor.resize();
  });
  document.addEventListener('mouseup', function(e) {
    if (isDragging) {
      isDragging = false;
      resizer.classList.remove('dragging');
      document.body.style.cursor = '';
      editor.resize();
    }
  });

  // Load schema for default DB, Pyodide lazily on first run
  refreshSchema("flis");
});
</script>
````
